title: QueryForge
description: A complete relational database engine — lexer, Pratt parser, a statistics-driven cost-based optimizer (equi-depth histograms + composite B+Tree indexes), a Volcano-model executor with hash & sort-merge joins, an external merge sort, correlated subqueries, CTEs (incl. WITH RECURSIVE), set operations, window functions with explicit ROWS/RANGE frames, statistical aggregates with FILTER, transactions, CSV import, an SVG chart view and an EXPLAIN visualizer — built from scratch in TypeScript, running entirely in the browser.
